message:
fix(codegen): Use unique temp var names to prevent shadowing

Updated labeledBlock calls to use labeledBlockDyn with name_gen.temp()
for unique temp variable names in:
- calls.zig: method call blocks (__obj -> unique names)
- misc.zig: attribute access blocks (__obj -> unique names)
- logical.zig: boolean op blocks (_a, _b -> unique names)
- subscript.zig: base_is_block section (__base -> unique names)

Note: Some subscript.zig blocks still use hardcoded names because
genSliceIndex() expects __s in scope - fixing these requires
refactoring genSliceIndex to accept variable name parameter.
